title: 菊花賞の後に・恥じて叱って、進め

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...I lost. It figures that Ryan would beat me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Her drive to dominate the Classics slightly
surpassed my own.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, I must not continue with my head hung
low!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will feel this shame. I will scold myself. But then,
I shall stand back up and move forward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let us go and discuss how we can adjust my
training regimen moving forward!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks for putting up a real fight, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you'll continue to get stronger and
stronger from here on out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I won't lose next time, either!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With the Kikuka Sho finished, there is little left to
do this year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Soon after we welcome in the new year, it will be
time for—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My number one objective... I will show everyone
the culmination of all my hard work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's fiery determination is
palpable, her eyes fixed firmly on what lies
ahead.
